questions.question: Find the unit digit of the given expression: (7)⁴⁹+(8)⁹⁸ - (15)⁴⁹
questions.explanation: 7 7x7=..9 9x7=..3 3x7=..1 Remainder of 49/4 is 1 Unit digit of 7⁴⁹ is 7 8 8x8=..4 4x8=..2 2x8=..6 6x8=..8 Remainder of 98/4 is 2 Unit digit of 8⁹⁸ is 4 And unit digit of 15⁴⁹ is 5 The required unit digit= 7+4-5 =6

questions.question: If P: Q = 3: 4 and Q: R = 5: 6, then P: Q: R is
Find the total number of female employees in company B and D together.
questions.explanation: Total male employees in company A = 39 * (48/52) = 36 Total female employees in company A = 39 Total employees in company A = 36 + 39 = 75 Total male employees in company B = 35 Total female employees in company B = 35 * (56.25/43.75) = 45 Total employees in company B = 35 + 45 = 80 Similarly, we can calculate other values... CompanyMaleFemaleTotal A39 * (48/52) = 363936 + 39 = 75 B3535 * (56.25/43.75) = 4535 + 45 = 80 C50 * (60/40) = 755075 + 50 = 125 D5454 * (55/45) = 6654 + 66 = 120 E54 * (64/36) = 965496 + 54 = 150 Total296254550 Total number of female employees in company B and D together = 45 + 66 = 111

questions.question: Find the average of total number of male employees in company A, C and E together.
questions.explanation: Total male employees in company A = 39 * (48/52) = 36 Total female employees in company A = 39 Total employees in company A = 36 + 39 = 75 Total male employees in company B = 35 Total female employees in company B = 35 * (56.25/43.75) = 45 Total employees in company B = 35 + 45 = 80 Similarly, we can calculate other values... CompanyMaleFemaleTotal A39 * (48/52) = 363936 + 39 = 75 B3535 * (56.25/43.75) = 4535 + 45 = 80 C50 * (60/40) = 755075 + 50 = 125 D5454 * (55/45) = 6654 + 66 = 120 E54 * (64/36) = 965496 + 54 = 150 Total296254550 Total number of male employees in company A, C and E together = 36 + 75 + 96 = 207 Average = 207/3 = 69

questions.question: What is the difference between total male employees in company B and D together and total female employees in company A, C and E together?
questions.explanation: Total male employees in company A = 39 * (48/52) = 36 Total female employees in company A = 39 Total employees in company A = 36 + 39 = 75 Total male employees in company B = 35 Total female employees in company B = 35 * (56.25/43.75) = 45 Total employees in company B = 35 + 45 = 80 Similarly, we can calculate other values... CompanyMaleFemaleTotal A39 * (48/52) = 363936 + 39 = 75 B3535 * (56.25/43.75) = 4535 + 45 = 80 C50 * (60/40) = 755075 + 50 = 125 D5454 * (55/45) = 6654 + 66 = 120 E54 * (64/36) = 965496 + 54 = 150 Total296254550 Total male employees in company B and D together = 35 + 54 = 89 Total female employees in company A, C and E together = 39 + 50 + 54 = 143 Difference = 143 - 89 = 54

questions.question: Find that total employees in company C is approximately what per cent of total employees in company E?
questions.explanation: Total male employees in company A = 39 * (48/52) = 36 Total female employees in company A = 39 Total employees in company A = 36 + 39 = 75 Total male employees in company B = 35 Total female employees in company B = 35 * (56.25/43.75) = 45 Total employees in company B = 35 + 45 = 80 Similarly, we can calculate other values... CompanyMaleFemaleTotal A39 * (48/52) = 363936 + 39 = 75 B3535 * (56.25/43.75) = 4535 + 45 = 80 C50 * (60/40) = 755075 + 50 = 125 D5454 * (55/45) = 6654 + 66 = 120 E54 * (64/36) = 965496 + 54 = 150 Total296254550 Total employees in company C = 125 Total employees in company E = 150 Per cent = (125/150) * 100 ≈ 83.33%

questions.question: If x² - x = 17, then find the value of (x+7)² + 39²/(x+7)².
If x + 1/2x = 5, what is the value of 46x/(√2x + 1)²?
A largest three-digit number which when divided by 5 and 13 leaves same remainder 3. What will be the remainder when that number is divided by 11?
questions.explanation: Largest 3-digit number which is divisible by 5 and 13 = Largest 3-digit number which is divisible by LCM of 5 and 13 = 975 Number which when divided by 5 and 13 leaves remainder 3 = 975 + 3 = 978 Remainder when 978 is divided by 11 = 978/11 = (968 + 10)/11 = [(88 * 11)/11] + [10/11] Hence, required remainder = 10

questions.question: If 80% of A is 13 more than 90% of B and the ratio of 40% of A to the 60% of B is 10:9, then what is the value of A² -B²?
If x + (1/3x) = 2, what is the value of (x⁴ + 4x²)/(36x³ + 1)?

Ankita purchased a television and a camera for Rs.12, 000 and Rs.8, 000 respectively. She sold the television at a loss of 10 per cent and camera at a profit of 12 per cent. What is her overall loss/profit?

The base of a parallelogram is 27 units and the area of the isosceles triangle drawn on the same base between the parallel lines of the parallelogram is 648 square units. Then find the vertical distance between the parallel lines.
questions.explanation: The base of the isosceles triangle is the base of the parallelogram, i.e. 27 units. And the isosceles triangle is constructed between the parallel lines of the parallelogram. So, the altitude of that triangle becomes the vertical distance between the parallel lines. Now, the area of the triangle = ½ x base x altitude = 648 square units. Or,½ x 27 x altitude = 648 Therefore, altitude = 648 * 2/ 27 = 48 units. Hence, option 4.

questions.question: The concentration of lemonade in three different mocktails ( lemonade and Soft drinks ) is ½, ⅔ and 2/4 respectively. If 3 liters, 6 liters and 1 litre are taken from these different vessels and mixed. What is the ratio of lemonade and Soft drinks in the new mixture?
questions.explanation: Quantity of lemonade taken from 1ˢᵗ vessel = 1.5 litre out of 3 litres Quantity of lemonade taken from 2ⁿᵈ vessel = 4 litre out of 6 litres Quantity of lemonade taken from 3ʳᵈ vessel = 0.5 litre from 1 litres. Therefore, total lemonade taken out from 1ˢᵗ, 2ⁿᵈ and 3ʳᵈ vessel = (1.5+4+0.5) = 6 litre So, the quantity of Soft drinks = ( 3+6+1)- 6 litres. = 4 litres. So, the ratio of lemonade to Soft drinks = 6/4 = 3:2. Hence, option 1.

questions.question: If tanq + cotq = 2, then what is the value of tan⁷ q + cot⁷ q?
questions.explanation: ∵ tanq +cotq =2 tan q + 1/tan q = 2 tan²q - 2 tan q + 1 = 0 or (tan q - 1)² = 0 So, tanq = 1 tan⁷ q + cot⁷ q = 1 + 1 = 2

questions.question: A train 100 metre long completely passes a man walking in the same direction at 6 km/h in 5 seconds and a car travelling in the same direction in 6 seconds. At what speed is the car travelling?
questions.explanation: Let the speeds of train and car be T km/h and C km/h respectively. According to question, 100_________(T - 6) x (5/18) = 5 T - 6 = 100 x 18/(5x5) = 72 T = 78 km/hr 100_________(T - C) x (5/18) = 6 T - C = 18 x 100/(5 x 6) = 60 C = 78 - 60 = 18 Hence, speed of car is 18 km/h.

questions.question: Evaluate: [2(1 - sin θ) - cos² θ] x [2(1 + sin θ) - cos² θ]_________cos⁴ θ
questions.explanation: 2(1 - sin θ) - cos² θ = 2(1 - sin θ) - (1 - sin ²θ) = 2(1 - sin θ) - (1 - sin θ)(1 + sin θ) = (1 - sin θ)(2 - 1 - sin θ) = (1 - sin θ)² 2(1 + sin θ) - cos² θ = 2(1 + sin θ) - (1 - sin ²θ) = 2(1 + sin θ) - (1 - sin θ)(1 + sin θ) = (1 + sin θ)(2 - 1 + sin θ) = (1 + sin θ)² So, numerator becomes: (1 - sin θ)² x (1 + sin θ)² = [(1 - sin θ)(1 + sin θ)]² = (cos² θ)² = cos⁴ θ So required value = cos⁴ θ/cos⁴ θ = 1

questions.question: If O is circumcentre of triangle PQR, ∠QPR=80° and ∠PQR=50°, then find the value of ∠OPQ?
questions.explanation: ![](https://u1.oliveboard.in/exams/solution/oliveimg/388743/image002.png) Given ∠QPR=80° and ∠PQR=50° ∠POR=2*∠PQR=2*50°=100° ∠QOR=2*∠QPR=2*80°=160° There ∠POQ=360°-160°-100°=100° ∠OPQ= (180°-100°)/2=40°

questions.question: The perimeter of a square is one fourth the perimeter of a rectangle. If the perimeter of a square is 44 cm and the length of the rectangle is 51 cm, what is the difference between the breadth of the rectangle and the side of the square?
questions.explanation: Let the side of the square = a cm Perimeter of the square = 44 cm 4a = 44 a = 11 cm Perimeter of square = ¼ perimeter of rectangle 4a = 2/4 (L + B) 44 = ½ (51 + B) 88 = 51 + B B = 88 - 51 B = 37 Difference between the breadth of the rectangle and the side of the square = 37 - 11 = 26 cm

questions.question: There were 54 students in a hostel. Due to the admission of 9 new students, the expenses of the mess were increased by Rs. 45 per day while the average expenditure per head diminished by Rs 2. What was the original expenditure of the mess?
questions.explanation: Let the original average expenditure be Rs. a. Then, 63 (a - 2) - 54a = 45; or a = 19 Original expenditure = Rs. (54x19) =Rs. 1026

questions.question: Two poles of equal heights are on either side of a 100 m wide road. From a point on the road, the angles of elevation of their tops are 30° and 60°. Find the height of each pole.
questions.explanation: Let the height of poles be h m. ![](https://u1.oliveboard.in/exams/solution/oliveimg/81355/image002.png) Tan 60 = h/x => √3 = h/x Or h = √3 x Similarly, 1/√3 = h/(100-x) => 100-x = √3 h = 3x => x = 25 Therefore, h = 25√3 m

questions.question: 7 men work 8 hours per day to complete one third piece of work in 36 days. The rest work is done by 24 men working 6 hours per day, then in how many days the rest work will be completed?
questions.explanation: As we know, Total work= men x days x hours Therefore using formula, M1D1H1/W1 = M2D2H2/W2 Here M₁=7, D₁=36, H₁=8, W₁=⅓ M₂=24, D₂=?, H₂=6, W₂= rest work = ⅔ We get, (7 X 36 X 8)/(⅓)= (24 X D2 X 6)/(⅔) => D₂= 28 days

questions.question: In a triangle APB, AB is diameter of circumcircle of triangle APB, AP = 8cm and BP = 6cm. Find the length of perpendicular PN, which is drawn from P to intersect AB at N.
questions.explanation: AP = 8cm PB =6cm ![](https://u1.oliveboard.in/exams/solution/oliveimg/p951/image003.jpg) Clearly it is right angled triangle AB = √(8² + 6²) = 10 Area of triangle APB = ½*AP*PB = ½*8*6 = 24 Area of triangle APB = ½*BA*PN 24 = ½*10*PN => PN = 24/5 = 4.8cm

questions.question: Kruti took a loan at simple interest rate of 6% in the first year with an increase of 0.5% in each subsequent year. She paid interest of Rs 3,375/- after four years. How much loan did she take?
questions.explanation: The rates of interest are 6%, 6.5%, 7% and 7.5% respectively. Interest = 3375 = P(6 + 6.5 + 7 + 7.5)/100 P = 3375 x 100/27 = 12500
